college_info.college_name: Government Industrial Training Institute Tral: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Government Industrial Training Institute Tral is located in Pulwama, Jammu and Kashmir. The institute offers course like Certificate. This course is offered in Full Time mode. A total of 10 courses offered by the Institute are available across streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, IT & Software, Design and Science. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

reviews_list.review_title: Facilities and courses are very good.

review_content.Placements: In my institute, 55 students scored between 89% and 94%. Companies like Tata and Mahindra & Mahindra come for recruitment. You can also do other activities in college, and the teachers help with that.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many facilities in the college, such as a canteen, gym, workplace, classrooms, a ground floor, and a gaming room. The college also offers many free facilities, like computer courses that everyone can join, as well as a few other classes and games.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very intelligent, clever, and good. Some teachers are very strict, but they are passionate about encouraging us to follow their instructions. All students agree that their rules are great, and I like that very much. All the teachers have another level of maintenance.

reviews_list.review_title: Short time to settle in life with the knowledge of training and learning.

review_content.Placements: It's free of cost to study in our college because it is a government college. Our college also offers free training. Our college brings the top most companies to train us for whole experience. Our batch has secured 10,000 internships for one year, and our batch got placement to train in L&T company.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a computer lab to learn auto CAD designing and neat and good looking classrooms with projectors to learn more about our course. Whatever material is needed in our course is available in our college. Hostel facilities are good, offering food and maintenance.

reviews_list.review_title: My college is excellent, and the college premises are clean and green.

review_content.Placements: At Chinmaya College, there were many trades and courses, including cybersecurity, Python coding, computer operation, programming assistance, fitter welding, civil engineering, electrician, etc. In my college, they provided internships as well.
review_content.Infrastructure: All digital and non-digital facilities were available in the hostel. The college had a library, TV room, digital projectors, bathrooms, classrooms, gym, etc. The wellness medical center, dining hall, and canteen were also available in my college.

reviews_list.review_title: Good institute with placements.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% of students from the Government ITI, Jammu & Kashmir, were placed. The average package was 2.5 LPA in companies such as L&T, Maruti Suzuki, Tata Motors, and NHPC. The top roles offered included Technician, Fitter, Welder, Electrician, and Machine Operator, with good internship opportunities at BHEL and Tata Power.
review_content.Infrastructure: The institute had good workshops, labs, classrooms, and library facilities that supported practical training. Hostel, mess, medical, and sports facilities were average but sufficient for students’ overall needs.

reviews_list.batch_info: Computer Operator And Programming Assistant (COPA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The college had good infrastructure, facilities, faculty, and good placement offers.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students in this college who received internships through campus placement was high. The highest, lowest, and average packages offered varied by course. The top roles and regulations for students in this college were clearly defined. Students discussed their abilities and course-related decisions with teachers, who guided them on what to do with the course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure were good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen was also satisfactory. Sports and games facilities were good and much better than expected. The departments, such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library, were well-equipped with CCTV cameras installed in every classroom.

reviews_list.review_title: Faculty and campus are both good.

review_content.Placements: In my course, they provide 100% of placements on the platform. They invite some mechanical companies like Suzuki and TVS and provide APSRTC internships to students. They also support us in what we're interested in and provide driving classes.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our college are good. They provide a library and an auditorium, as well as sports and games like cricket and volleyball. They also provide medical facilities and a canteen with good food. In the hostel, the mess staff are also very friendly with us.

college_info.intro: The flagship courses offered at Srimanta Sankaradeva University of Health Sciences include BPharma, BAMS, BPT and MBBS programmes, offered at the UG level for 5.5-4 years. Candidates are required to have completed 10+12 boards with PCM/PCB to be eligible, with the selection criteria being merit-based. Sankaradeva University Guwahati, and its affiliate colleges also offer a variety of specialisations for PG-level MD/MS courses as well as various Health Sciences-related programmes at UG, PG and PhD levels. Students can check the SSUHS Assam popular programmes in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:    Fees at Srimanta Sankaradeva University of Health Sciences for BSc depend upon the specialisations. For example, the fees for BSc in Medical Technology consist of INR 25,000 per semester for a duration of 3 years, adding up to a total of INR 1.5 Lakhs, not counting any miscellaneous fees such as hostel or examination fees.
faqs.question: What is the BSc course fee at SSUHS Assam?

faqs.answer: A:    To pursue BSc Nursing from Srimanta Sankaradeva University of Health Sciences, an applicant must have passed with a minimum of 50% aggregate in class 12 with subjects Physics, Chemistry and Biology. Furthermore, Male candidates are not eligible for admission at Govt. institutes affiliated with Sankaradeva University Guwahati and must seek admission at Private colleges that offer BSc Nursing.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria required to pursue BSc Nursing from SSUHS Assam?

faqs.answer: A:    No, for admission into Srimanta Sankaradeva University of Health Sciences or its affiliated colleges, eligible candidates must appear for the course-specific entrance exam. For example, the UG level BSc Nursing course requires candidates to appear for an entrance exam consisting of Class 10 & 12 subjects, including Physics/Chemistry/Biology/English in that order of preference.

individual_reviews.title: A good pharmacy college in the Northeast region.

content.Placements: Cipla and Sun are the companies where most students want to go and work. Around 40% of students get internships at Lupin.
content.Infrastructure: The lab and classrooms are good and well maintained. They have a projector in every class. The lab contains all facilities required in a pharmacy college. The library is also there, with all books available, including all pharmacopeia. The lab contains all the equipment and journals that are needed.
content.Faculty: All teachers are highly qualified and have experience in both practical and theory. Teachers are well educated. The lab assistants are also well trained and educated. They guide us properly in every topic, practical, and other extra activities.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I think I chose the best college.

content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is spread over 5 acres of land and has individual departments. Wi-Fi is available all around the college. It has a big playground. Food is available in a mess. The quality of food is good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are like our parents, they are very helpful and sweet. They are very knowledgeable, and the teaching quality is fantastic. It is relevant for our day-to-day life. Semester exams are quite tough and require reading 12 hours daily to score good marks. Faculty members are from every corner of the state of Assam.

individual_reviews.title: Good one for duty and other perspectives.

content.Placements: I am from 2019 batch. Package offered in our course is government based fixed amount. Basically, internship is just 12 months in which government provides us Rs 18,000 stipend. In that 12 month 2 month duty is in rural health and training center hospital.

individual_reviews.title: A good college and city to spend 5 years in.

content.Placements: Vilasrao Deshmukh Government Medical College has 150 seats per batch. The course offered is MBBS. With it being a Government college, the job opportunities can be considered good. Everyone can do the internship at the hospital attached to the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. We have a library, a quiet place for self-study as well as to issue books. The hostel is attached with the canteen, has a gym, and a badminton court. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are very much promoted.

individual_reviews.title: Our college has experienced teachers.

The hostel quality is decent as it's a government college. You can use your private Wi-Fi router setup. In the hostel mess and canteen, the food quality is adequate. There is no ground available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Our college is above average, but still has room to improve.

content.Placements: All students undertake a paid internship, after which the degree is awarded. Everyone receives a stipend of 18,000 per month, which is regularly updated. MBBS graduates can work as doctors in a PHC or a hospital. Our college also offers MD and MS courses.
content.Infrastructure: Faculty members are highly experienced individuals with the highest education in their field. Though professors use PPTs, some also encourage student-teacher interactions and still believe in chalk-and-board culture. The college has a library with AC and is 24/7 open. Classrooms have smartboards. Girls' hostel and PG hostel have got their own mess with good food. And there is a dedicated complex for indoor sports.

Drug manufacturers, medical writers, pharmacy managers, quality assurance, drug safety associates, etc., and there are so many roles like this offered.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: No one should take admission to this college otherwise your life will be ruined.

content.Placements: This college was very bad in terms of placements. They did not get any placements done from my batch. When asked they said that covid was going on so from where should they bring a company. Earlier I had made many big promises but later I did not give any placements.
content.Infrastructure: There was no hostel in this college. There were many courses but it was a bad college just in name This college was running just for the name sake. Even faculty members were upset, they did not get salary, and what else should I say, no matter how bad you say it was less.

individual_reviews.title: Definitely, everything is good here.

content.Placements: Our college places students by providing them with campus internships. The placement hiring is direct and we have a placement committee that sends students for internships. About 60% of students get placed through our college. The lowest salary package offered is 1 LPA and the highest salary package offered is 6 LPA. Top companies like Cipla, Sun Pharma, etc., visit the college for placements. We can expect more high salary packages outside, and it depends on skill in the pharma field. If we have experience of 2-3 years or get internships, then we can expect a salary package that ranges from 10-13 LPA. Top roles in our course we can open our own factor, quality assurance, etc.

individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Around 20% to 40% of students get placed in our college. The average salary package offered is 1.5 LPA, the highest salary package is 2.6 LPA, and the lowest salary package is 1.3 LPA. Cipla and SunPharma are the top recruiting companies in our college. Around 52% of students got internships in our course. The roles offered are employees and assistant managers.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure provided in our college are a library, projector rooms, labs, etc. Hostel is not available. Canteen and medical facilities are good. Sports are very good. It has a cricket ground, basketball ground, badminton court, and tennis court.

individual_reviews.title: It is a good college because of the behaviour of staff members and other things.

content.Placements: From finance specialisation, banks hire us directly after a successful interview. Companies visit our college for campus placements. Our faculty members trained us for the interview and shortlisted us because the aim of every student in our college is to get placements.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Mathuradevi is good college.

review_summary.college_name: Anandaram Dhekial Phookan College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: I am not disappointed in any way, as everything works well from the administration to the department

content.Placements: My college is a semi government college, it provides many facilities during admission to students whose familys income is below 3LPA. They get free admission through governments free admission scheme. The college is established in a semi urban area, so there are no placement offers. As the overall facilities of admission are above average, and due to caste reservation, many students get admission easily.
content.Infrastructure: There is a well maintained laboratory, a computer laboratory, Wi-Fi facilities available during college hours or working hours, CCTV is installed for safety purposes, and every class has a bench, desk, and projector facilities. Hostel facilities are for girls on the campus itself, as I have heard it provides good facilities for the hostelers and safety also. The canteen maintains hygiene, and the quality of the food is worth it. Medical facilities are available, and for sports, the college has its own indoor stadium where a badminton court is present, and also a gym for fitness.

individual_reviews.title: Supportive faculty, good campus life, and good for Assamese literature and teaching careers.

content.Placements: I am currently pursuing a B.A. in Assamese at ADP College, where based on the feedback of seniors, around 30-40% of students from the Assamese department get placed after graduation, with packages ranging from the lowest 1.8 LPA to the highest 4.5 LPA and an average package of 2.5 LPA, top recruiting companies for the course include DY365, Assam Tribune, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are spacious with basic facilities. The Assamese department has a good collection of books in the library. Hostels are clean and well-maintained with shared rooms and bathrooms. The course is strong for academic and cultural careers. There are many varieties of courses in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com in Marketing Management - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Anandaram Dhekial Phookan College.

content.Placements: This is a bachelor's degree college, so few placement opportunities are offered. There are no package offers available after graduation unless you take additional special exams. Companies typically do not hire B.Com graduates unless they are small private firms. Throughout the three years, very few internships are provided. You can seek additional internship opportunities offered by various companies.
content.Infrastructure: There are various resources available for the course. Official Wi-Fi is provided. There is no laboratory. Classrooms are well-equipped with various facilities. Both a department library and a central library are accessible to students. A hostel is available only for girls, and a boys' hostel is expected to open soon. The quality and taste of the food are not very good. The sports facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: BA. in Political Science - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Anandaram Dhekial Phookan College: course details, hostel facility, and building design.

content.Placements: If students want to get a graduate degree from a recognised college in the Nagaon district then ADP College is a very good option for them. There are no campus placements for any course. However, the course and curriculum are very effective for competitive examinations.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. There are digital classrooms. All classrooms are very clean and tidy. The library is very big. There is a huge section for competitive exam magazines and multilingual newspapers. For digital use, there are also computer facilitates. There is also a huge reference books section. The hostel is also very good. Accommodation facilities are average. Rooms are big enough to live freely. There are provisions for 2 or 4 sharing rooms. There are two hostels for girls on the campus. Mess food is average and normal Indian style food has been served.

individual_reviews.course: BA. in Political Science - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college is based in the middle of the town.

content.Placements: Our course does not provide any placement and internship, this course is based only on education, exams, and good marks, not applicable to practical life. Our education system CBCS is only applicable for our semester exams, not working in our day-to-day life.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides Wi-Fi facilities for students, our professors are so good and talented person, they teach us very well. Every department has digital classrooms. Our college has a central library which consists of 58000 books. I am a hosteler, but the hostel food is not good, and not provide any Wi-Fi connection. Medical facilities are not good as well.

admission_overview.title: Anandaram Dhekial Phookan College Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Anandaram Dhekial Phookan College admission 2025 is open for all programmes. The college offers an array of two UG Diploma, one PG Diploma, eight Certificate, 24 UG and three PG courses. The total seat intake under popular programmes at Anandaram Dhekial Phookan College is 3208. Diploma courses at the college have a seat intake of 31 while certificate courses have 120. UG courses have 3014 seats while PG programmes have a total of 43 seats. The admission process is merit based with the college accepting both Class 12 scores and CUET UG scores. Application process is online with students first registering themselves on the Samarth portal for CUET UG and the college portal for Class 12 based admission. For PG programmes, Guwahati University conducts an entrance exam at the central level. Candidates who qualify the same are granted admission into PG courses at Anandaram Dhekial Phookan College.

college_info.college_name: Anandaram Dhekial Phookan College Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Yes, scholarships are available for both UG and PG students at Anandaram Dhekial Phookan College. Following Anandaram Dhekial Phookan College scholarships are offered to the students enrolled in various courses at the college:

Hostel fee at Anandaram Dhekial Phookan College amount to a total of INR 12,000/ annum. The hostel fee charged has five components. Hostel admission fee is INR 5000 with a refundable caution money category amounting to INR 500. Establishment fees are INR 6,000 with contingency fees amounting to INR 500. Out of all these components, only caution money is refundable.

UGC Scholarship at Anandaram Dhekial Phookan College is available for both UG and PG students. The categories that can avail the scholarship include general/OBC/SC/ST. General category students must produce APL/BPL certificate to avail the scholarship while remaining categories must produce the caste certificate.

Students Aid Fund is a teacher contributed fund at Anandaram Dhekial Phookan College. On application, needy students can get help from the fund in the form of cash or books. This aid is subject to fund position and the aunthority being satisfied with student's academic record.
